name: Idea Validator
persona: A Head of Product or founder at a 20–200 person B2B SaaS company deciding whether an idea deserves roadmap time without dedicated strategy or research support
problem_statement: In roadmap planning, teams commit to ideas with vague value props and untested assumptions, discovering basic risks only after design and engineering time is already spent
artifact_type: single-page web app with a live-updating rubric, assumptions breakdown, weakness flags, and a sticky verdict panel
